Risk Title: Resource onboarding delays due to BGV
Risk Desc:
Once the resources are onboarded, they must go through BGV.
The timing is not specified, and the resource must wait until the BGV is cleared before gaining access to FIS.
Once he has access, the resource must make a separate access request for the application. 

Consequences: According to the SOW/CR, we must achieve the milestones for the number of pages created and test cases run, hence we may not be able to bill the customer in full. Project-Level           External                          Customer         Major      Likely Very High
Category:
Prepare BGV onboarding checklist and share with resources while sending offer. 
Work with FIS BGV team periodically for quick turn around and remove any bottlenecks.

Risk Desc:
The current SOW for project is set to expire on December 30th 2023. However, we have submitted a Change Request (CR) to extend the project until June 2024. Please note that due to the upcoming holiday season, there may be potential delays in obtaining the sign-off for this CR.

If the CR is not signed, the team will be offloaded and relocated. Project-Level           External                          Customer         Major    Possible      High
Category: Follow up with the client on the CR sign off.

Risk Desc:
As per the SOW ,we need to delivery Baseline Velocity completed story points per sprint.
Performance Credits will be issued as follows:
90-100% of Baseline Velocity – No Performance Credit
75-89.99% of Baseline Velocity – 5% of sprint invoice
74.99% or below – 20% of sprint invoice

Consequences: We will have an impact on billing, which will result in revenue loss. Project-Level     Organizational              Project dependencies        Severe    Possible Very High
Category:
It is important to plan the sprint according to the team's leave plans, and outages.
Review the status of the stories in daily scrum meetings and inform the FIS team of any dependencies or issues.

Risk Title: 2 QA resources moved to different  POD
Risk Desc:
As per FIS' request for a critical delivery, two QA resources - one Technical QA and one functional QA - will be relocated to a different POD. This change will inevitably affect the execution of test cases in IBS.
 Project-Level           External                          Customer         Major      Likely Very High
Category: Align to update milestone based on the new team composition , This will help us to assess the cost impact on the monthly billing and adjust accordingly.

Risk Title: Access restriction issues in CVS Retail Production Support
Risk Desc:
Access restriction issues in CVS Retail Production Support across towers to achieve L1 synergy.
We are planning to implement L1 synergy across Supply Chain/Patient Safety and Store Operations. But we observe access restrictions from CVS Customer which blocks our L1 Synergy and Optimization Plan. Project-Level          Technical           Connectivity and access      Moderate      Likely      High
Category:
Plan to highlight the importance of L1  Synergy across all towers to CVS, along with its benefits and enable access  for L1 teams between Supply Chain/Patient Safety & Store Ops.
Long term plan is to implement L1 Synergy across all the towers, operate as common team and enable 24*7 coverage

Risk Title: Optimized Production Support team demands high risk on delivery & Issues on Shift Coverage
Risk Desc: Reduced team size may lead to high risk on delivery & Shift Coverage gaps. CVS Retail Production Support has majorly 4 towers. 1) Rx Growth 2) Front store 3) Supply Chain & Patient Safety 4) Store Operations We are planning for Optimized Production support effective September 01,2024 in order to synchronous with our proposed staffing plan and it demands high risk on delivery and shift coverage issues considering any ad-hoc leaves/national holidays Project-Level Project Management                         Execution         Minor        Rare       Low
Category:
Bring In synergy between all 4 towers for L1 team, and automate manual activities as much as possible to reduce the day to day effort.
Additional resources to be equally added across all towers to ensure 24*7 support without any delivery issues
